- [type 4 otic fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002668) [has exact synonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "type 4 spiral ligament fibrocyte" 

- [type 4 otic fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002668) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A spiral ligament fibrocyte that is located in the triangular space inferior to the crista basilaris (basilar crest). This cell is spindle-shaped and expresses NKCC1 but minimal to no Na,K-ATPase (ATP1A1, ATP1B1) in mice and humans, and lacks connexin 26/30 in mice, indicating it does not participate in K⁺ recycling, unlike type II fibrocytes. Type IV fibrocyte is uniquely characterised by strong expression of connective tissue growth factor (CTGF) in mice, suggesting roles in tissue remodelling and paracrine signalling to other cochlear cells." 
  - [database_cross_reference](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasDbXref) "PMID:33193034" 

  - [database_cross_reference](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasDbXref) "PMID:18353863" 

  - [database_cross_reference](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasDbXref) "GOC:tfm" 

  - [database_cross_reference](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasDbXref) "PMID:19277783" 

- [type 4 otic fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002668) [has_related_synonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "type IV SLF" 
  - [database_cross_reference](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasDbXref) "PMID:33193034" 

  - [has_synonym_type](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasSynonymType) [abbreviation](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OMO_0003000) 

- [type 4 otic fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002668) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "type IV spiral ligament fibrocyte" 

- [type 4 otic fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002668) SubClassOf [spiral ligament fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0020005) 


### type 5 otic fibrocyte `http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002667`
#### Removed
- [type 5 otic fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002667) [has exact synonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasExactSynonym) "type V spiral ligament fibrocyte" 

- [type 5 otic fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002667) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "An otic fibrocyte that resides above the stria vasularis and is part of a mesenchymal gap junction network that regulates ionic homeostasis of the endolymph." 
  - [database_cross_reference](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasDbXref) "PMID:18353863" 

  - [database_cross_reference](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasDbXref) "GOC:tfm" 

- [type 5 otic fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002667) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "type 5 otic fibrocyte" 

- [type 5 otic fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002667) SubClassOf [otic fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002665) 

#### Added
- [type 5 otic fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002667) [has_broad_synonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasBroadSynonym) "type 5 otic fibrocyte" 

- [type 5 otic fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002667) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "A spiral ligament fibrocyte located in the suprastrial region above the stria vascularis, distinguished from other fibrocytes by their unique expression of COX-1 in guinea pigs and end-foot structures that directly contact capillaries (Dai and Shi, 2011). This fibro-vascular coupling enables type V fibrocytes to regulate cochlear blood flow by translating Ca&sup2;⁺ signals into capillary vasodilation via COX-1-derived prostaglandins. This cell also participates in K⁺ recycling, expressing Na,K-ATPase (ATP1A1, ATP1B1) in mice and humans, and connexin 26/30 gap junctions enabling intercellular K⁺ transport within the spiral ligament syncytium (Peeleman et al., 2020)." 
  - [database_cross_reference](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasDbXref) "PMID:33193034" 

  - [database_cross_reference](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasDbXref) "PMID:18353863" 

  - [database_cross_reference](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasDbXref) "GOC:tfm" 

  - [database_cross_reference](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasDbXref) "PMID:21673815" 

- [type 5 otic fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002667) [has_related_synonym](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasRelatedSynonym) "type V SLF" 
  - [database_cross_reference](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasDbXref) "PMID:33193034" 

  - [has_synonym_type](http://www.geneontology.org/formats/oboInOwl#hasSynonymType) [abbreviation](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/OMO_0003000) 

- [type 5 otic fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002667) [label](http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#label) "type V spiral ligament fibrocyte" 

- [type 5 otic fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0002667) SubClassOf [spiral ligament fibrocyte](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/CL_0020005)

- [voltage-gated calcium channel activity involved in Purkinje myocyte cell action potential](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/GO_0086058) [definition](http://purl.obolibrary.org/obo/IAO_0000115) "Enables the transmembrane transfer of a calcium ion by a voltage-gated channel across the plasma membrane of an Purkinje myocyte cell that contributes to the depolarization phase of an action potential.
